hero.title: Elevating African Academic Excellence
hero.subtitle: A transparent, free indexing directory for African scholarly journals, featuring specialized impact reports designed to value local research contributions.

valprop.title: Empowering the African Knowledge Economy
valprop.desc: AfriJournal Index overcomes the visibility barriers that African academic editors face daily.
valprop.indexing_text: We index peer-reviewed journals published on the African continent completely free of charge, making your research discoverable.
valprop.if_text: Access rigorous, calculations of your journal's citation impact factor to increase institutional prestige.
valprop.eval_text: Our platform runs automated checks on ISSN, publication history, and editorial boards to verify quality status instantly.

showcase.title: Seed Directory: KENPRO Journals
showcase.desc: Explore the initial catalog of peer-reviewed journals powered by the Kenya Projects Organization (KENPRO).

cta.title: Ready to Index Your Academic Journal?
cta.desc: Submit your publication to our automated review system. Establish verification and get calculated impact reports today.

footer.desc: Connecting African academic journals with the global scholarly community through open discovery, transparent indexing, and rigorous metrics.

submit_page.title: Journal Submission Portal
submit_page.desc: Submit your academic publication to be evaluated for free indexing in the AfriJournal database.
submit_page.scope_placeholder: Describe the aims, scope, and topics covered by the journal...
submit_page.upload_sub: Drag and drop or select a PDF file
submit_page.terms_label: I agree to the Terms & Conditions of AfriJournal Index indexing policy.

browse_page.title: Indexed Journals Directory
browse_page.desc: Search and discover validated, peer-reviewed journals published across the African continent.
browse_page.no_results: No journals found matching your search criteria.

pricing_page.title: Evaluation & Metric Report Pricing
pricing_page.desc: Journal indexing is completely free. Purchase detailed metric analysis and impact factor evaluation reports to build visibility.
pricing_page.free_desc: Basic inclusion in the directory list accessible by researchers and libraries globally.
pricing_page.basic_desc: Calculates your standard 2-year citation impact factor and provides a formal rating page.
pricing_page.premium_desc: Comprehensive evaluation report with citation path maps, local impact scoring, and improvement guide.

about_page.subtitle: Establishing transparent indexing metrics for African scientific research.
about_page.mission_text1: Scholarly journals published in Africa frequently face structural barriers to inclusion in global indexing databases. AfriJournal Index was founded to bridge this gap, providing a free, high-standard indexing platform specifically designed for journals hosted across Africa.
about_page.mission_text2: Our platform evaluates quality guidelines fairly, using automation to verify ISSN standards, peer-review structures, publication frequency, and regional contributions to academic scholarship.
about_page.partner_text: In partnership with Kenya Projects Organization (KENPRO), we host a seed directory of verified, high-impact regional journals including ARJESS, JMBA, and IJEHS, ensuring local scientific inquiries are cataloged for global citation access.

contact_page.desc: Have questions about standard indexing or metric evaluations? Send us a message.

methodology_page.desc: How we calculate standard citation impact factors for regional African journals.
methodology_page.formula_desc: The African Journal Impact Factor (AJIF) is computed annually by tracking peer-reviewed articles and counting citations registered within the AfriJournal directory.
methodology_page.formula_num: Citations in 2025 to articles published in 2023-2024
methodology_page.criteria_1: Metadata Consistency: Verified active ISSN/eISSN status with regional registries.
methodology_page.criteria_2: Open Peer-Review: Verified adherence to transparent editorial peer-review workflows.
methodology_page.criteria_3: Publishing Regularity: The journal must publish at least two issues annually without gaps.
